briefdescription.para: Units MΩ
Check if the value is a valid baseline fraction.
Return the total length of a single testpulse with baseline.

parameterdescription.para: duration of the high portion of the testpulse in points or time
fraction, not percentage, of the baseline

briefdescription.para: Inverse function of TP_CalculateTestPulseLength.

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, wave TPWave, variable tpMarker, string hsList)
memberdef.name: TP_StoreTP

briefdescription.para: Stores the given TP wave.

detaileddescription.para:
device
device
TPWave
reference to wave holding the TP data, see GetOscilloscopeWave()
tpMarker
unique number for this set of TPs from all TP channels
hsList
list of headstage numbers in the same order as the columns of TPWave
The stored test pulse waves will have column dimension labels in the format HS_X.

briefdescription.para: Return a number of consecutive test pulses ending with the TP identified by tpMarker.

detaileddescription.para: The wave reference wave will have as many columns as active headstages were used.

briefdescription.para: Split the stored testpulse wave reference wave into single waves for easier handling.

Receives data from the async function TP_TSAnalysis(), buffers partial results and puts complete results back to main thread, results are base line level, steady state resistance, instantaneous resistance and their positions collected results for all channels of a measurement are send to TP_RecordTP(), DQ_ApplyAutoBias() when complete.

parameterdescription.para: output data folder from ASYNC frame work with results from workloads associated with this registered function The output parameter in the data folder follow the definition as created in TP_TSAnalysis()
error code of TP_TSAnalysis() function
error message of TP_TSAnalysis() function

briefdescription.para: Return a 2D wave with two testpulses concatenated.

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable headstage, wave TPResults, wave TPs)
memberdef.name: TP_AutoBaseline

memberdef.definition: static std::tuple< variable, variable, variable > TP_AutoFitBaseline
memberdef.name: TP_AutoFitBaseline

briefdescription.para: Fit the tail of the first TP with an expontential and return it's time constant.
Automatically tune the Testpulse amplitude and baseline.

inbodydescription.para: all variables holding physical units use plain values without prefixes e.g Amps instead of pA

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, wave autoTPEnable, variable headstage, variable QC)
memberdef.name: TP_AutoTPTurnOff

briefdescription.para: Disable Auto TP if it passed TP_AUTO_TP_CONSECUTIVE_PASSES times in a row.

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, variable headstage=defaultValue, variable first=defaultValue, variable last=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: TP_AutoTPGenerateNewCycleID

briefdescription.para: Generate new auto TP cycle IDs.

detaileddescription.para: This is required everytime we lock a device or toggle Auto TP for a headstage

parameterdescription.para: device
[optional, default to all headstages] only update it for a specific headstage
[optional, default to all headstages] only update the range [first, last]
[optional, default to all headstages] only update the range [first, last]

memberdef.argsstring: (wave TPStorage, variable headstage, string entry, variable numReqEntries, variable options=defaultValue)
memberdef.name: TP_GetValuesFromTPStorage

briefdescription.para: Return the last numReqEntries non-NaN values from layer entry of headstage

parameterdescription.para: TP results wave, see GetTPStorage()
Headstage
Name of the value to search
Number of entries to return, supports integer values and inf
[optional, default to nothing] One of TPStorageQueryingOptions

briefdescription.para: This function analyses a TP data set. It is called by the ASYNC frame work in an own thread. currently six properties are determined.

parameterdescription.para: input data folder from the ASYNC framework, parameter input order therein follows the setup in TP_SendToAnalysis()

briefdescription.para: Calculates running average [box average] for all entries and all headstages.

memberdef.argsstring: (string device, wave TPResults, variable now, variable tpMarker)
memberdef.name: TP_RecordTP

briefdescription.para: Records values from TPResults into TPStorage at defined intervals.

detaileddescription.para: Used for analysis of TP over time.

memberdef.argsstring: (wave TPStorage, variable startRow, variable endRow, variable headstage)
memberdef.name: TP_FitResistance

briefdescription.para: Threadsafe wrapper for performing CurveFits on the TPStorage wave.
Determine the slope of the steady state resistance over a user defined window (in seconds)

parameterdescription.para: locked device string
test pulse storage wave
last valid row index in TPStorage

briefdescription.para: Stop running background testpulse on all locked devices.
Stop any running background test pulses.

parameterdescription.para: device
[optional, defaults to false] Performs only the totally necessary steps for tear down.

briefdescription.para: Restarts a test pulse previously stopped with TP_StopTestPulse.
Prepare device for TestPulse.

parameterdescription.para: device
Testpulse running mode, one of TestPulseRunModes
[optional, defaults to false] Performs only the totally necessary steps for setup

briefdescription.para: Common setup calls for TP and TP during DAQ.
Perform common actions after the testpulse.
Common teardown calls for TP and TP during DAQ.
Return the number of devices which have TP running.
Check if the testpulse is running.

detaileddescription.para: Can not be used to check for foreground TP as during foreground TP/DAQ nothing else runs.

briefdescription.para: See if the testpulse has run enough times to create valid measurements.

parameterdescription.para: DA_Ephys panel name
number of cycles that test pulse must run

briefdescription.para: Save the amplifier holding command in the TPStorage wave.
Create the testpulse wave with the current settings.
Prepares a TP data set data folder to the asynchroneous analysis function TP_TSAnalysis.

parameterdescription.para: title of panel that ran this test pulse
holds the parameters send to analysis

simplesect.para: data folder that can be pushed for execution by the async frame work

briefdescription.para: Send a TP data set to the asynchroneous analysis function TP_TSAnalysis.

parameterdescription.para: title of panel that ran this test pulse
holds the parameters send to analysis

briefdescription.para: Convert from row names of GetTPSettings()/GetTPSettingsCalculated() to GetTPSettingsLBN() column names.
Update the Testpulse labnotebook wave.

detaileddescription.para:
DAQ:
TPSettings holds the current GUI values
TPSettingsLabnotebook holds the settings which were active when the sweep started

TP:
TPSettings holds the current GUI values
TPSettingsLabnotebook is cleared when TP is started and filled from TPSettings when TP is stopped This means we only have the latest values for the TP settings which don't restart TP. For entries which do restart TP we always have the current values. See also the DAEPHYS_TP_CONTROLS_XXX constants.

simplesect.para: DAP_TPGUISettingToWave() for the special auto TP entry handling.

briefdescription.para: Return the TP cycle ID for the given device.

detaileddescription.para: Follower and leader will have the same TP cycle ID.

briefdescription.para: Return the length in points of the power spectrum generated via FFT.
TP Basic Testpulse related functionality
